title: Prettier Fast Leaves for Whimscape
description: An unofficial add-on for Whimscape aiming at making the leaves in Fast Graphics more appealing
body:
This resourcepack simply adds a darker background color to all leaves, making them more pretty when using Fast Graphics!

![All the leaves in Fast Graphics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2984fc7aef2481c16533c049cbcfe06d89bec3d.png)
